GENERICS_READY_PROMPT: <tts config='happy'>Let me know when you're ready ${append}!</tts>
GENERICS_READY_NO_INPUT: <tts config='happy'>Let me know when you're ready ${append}!</tts>
GENERICS_READY_NO_MATCH: <tts config='embarrassed'>I didn't quite understand that, let me know when you're ready ${append}!</tts>
MAIN_CONTINUE_OR_RESTART_PROMPT_1: You can continue from step ${step} on ${title}, or start fresh with a new search. What do you wanna do?
MAIN_CONTINUE_OR_RESTART_NO_INPUT_1: You can continue from step ${step} on ${title}, or start fresh with a new search. What do you wanna do?
MAIN_CONTINUE_OR_RESTART_NO_MATCH_1: I didn't understand that. You can continue from step ${step} on ${title}, or start fresh with a new search. What do you wanna do?
MAIN_END_OR_RESTART_PROMPT_1: We can end the skill, or search for another recipe. What do you wanna do?
MAIN_END_OR_RESTART_NO_INPUT_1: We can end the skill, or search for another recipe. What do you wanna do?
MAIN_END_OR_RESTART_NO_MATCH_1: I didn't understand, we can end the skill, or search for another recipe. What do you wanna do?
GUIDED_STEPS_INGREDIENTS_OR_RECIPE_PROMP: You can see the ingredients, or start cooking. What do you wanna do?
GUIDED_STEPS_NOTIFICATION_PROMPT: You can repeat the last step, or continue to ${nextStep}. What do you wanna do?
GUIDED_STEPS_NOTIFICATION_MESSAGE: You can repeat the last step, or continue to
INGREDIENTS_READ_INGREDIENTS_PROMPT_1: Here are the ingredients, <tts config='happy'>do you want me to read them out?</tts>
INGREDIENTS_HOW_MUCH_PROMPT_1: Sorry, I couldn't find ${ingredient} in the ingredients.
INGREDIENTS_WHAT_NEXT_PROMPT_1: We can go back, make this recipe, or <tts config='happy'>I can read the ingredients ${again}.</tts> What do you wanna do?
INGREDIENTS_WHAT_NEXT_NO_INPUT_1: We can go back, make this recipe, or <tts config='happy'>I can read the ingredients ${again}.</tts> What do you wanna do?
INGREDIENTS_WHAT_NEXT_NO_MATCH_1: We can go back, make this recipe, or <tts config='happy'>I can read the ingredients ${again}.</tts> What do you wanna do?
PICTURE_TAKE_A_PICTURE_PROMPT_1: <tts config='happy'>Do you wanna take a picture of your ${title}?</tts>
LOAD_DATA_NO_RESULTS_PROMPT_1: <tts config='sad'>Sorry!</tts> I couldn't find anything that matches ${search}. <tts config='excited'>Let's try again!</tts>
RECIPE_SELECTION_COOKTIME_PROMPT: ${title} takes ${prep} to prepare and ${cook} to cook, totalling ${total}.
RECIPE_SELECTION_RESET_PROMPT: I cleared your old search and made a new one for ${token}.
RECIPE_SELECTION_RATING_PROMPT: ${title} has an average rating of ${rating} stars, from ${reviewCount} reviews.
RECIPE_SELECTION_WHAT_NEXT_PROMPT_1: <tts config='happy'>You can make ${title}</tts>, or see the next recipe. What do you wanna do?
RECIPE_SELECTION_WHAT_NEXT_PROMPT_3: <tts config='happy'>I only found one recipe, ${title}. It has a ${rating} star rating.</tts>
RECIPE_SELECTION_WHAT_NEXT_NO_INPUT_1: You can navigate to the previous or next recipes, see the ingredients, watch the video, make this recipe, or restart with a fresh search.
RECIPE_SELECTION_WHAT_NEXT_NO_MATCH_1: I didn't understand that. You can navigate to the previous or next recipes, see the ingredients, watch the video, make this recipe, or restart with a fresh search.
WHAT_DO_YOU_WANT_RECOMMENDATION_PROMPT: <tts config='excited'>I'll show you some of my favorites!</tts>
WHAT_DO_YOU_WANT_TOKEN_PROMPT: I'll see what I can find for <tts config='excited'>${token}!</tts>
WHAT_DO_YOU_WANT_FAVORITES_PROMPT_1: Here are the recipes that you have favorited.
WHAT_DO_YOU_WANT_FAVORITES_PROMPT_2: <tts config='sad'>Oh no! You don't have any favorite recipes.</tts> <tts config='excited'>Click the heart icon to favorite a recipe.</tts>
WHAT_DO_YOU_WANT_OPTIONS_PROMPT_1: Here are some options to help you.
WHAT_DO_YOU_WANT_HELP_PROMPT_1: Tap back to return to voice commands.
WHAT_DO_YOU_WANT_WHAT_DO_YOU_WANT_PROMPT: <tts config='excited'>I'm starving!</tts> What should we eat?
<tts config='happy'>I've got tons of recipes to look at</tts>, got anything in mind?
<tts config='excited'>${greeting}, ${name}!</tts> What do you want for ${meal}?
WHAT_DO_YOU_WANT_WHAT_DO_YOU_WANT_NO_INP: <tts config='happy'>I can search for recipes by name or ingredient, or I can surprise you with something tasty!</tts>
VIDEO_WHAT_NEXT_PROMPT_1: You can replay any part of this video, make this recipe, or go back to recipe selection. What do you wanna do?
VIDEO_WHAT_NEXT_PROMPT_2: You can replay this video, or go back to the directions. What do you wanna do?
VIDEO_WHAT_NEXT_NO_MATCH_1: I'm sorry, I didn't understand that.
